name: Schnecken
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 oz (50g) currants (washed and well drained, finely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the pastry to a rectangle measuring 14x18 inches (45x35 cm) and brush with the fat.
2. For the filling: mix together the filling ingredients and distribute evenly over the pastry.
3. Starting from the shorter side, roll up like a Swiss roll.
4. Use a sharp knife to cut off slices about 1 1/4 inches thick.
5. Lay these on a greased baking sheet and flatten slightly.
6. Preheat the oven for 5 minutes at very hot (400°C).
7. BAKING TIME: 15-20 minutes.
8. For the icing: sieve the icing sugar (powdered sugar) and blend with as much of the water as will give a good coating consistency. Ice the schnecken while still hot.
I know of no substitute for the vanillin sugar, you might want to check gourmet shops or specialty shops. Alternatively, a custard mix might work.
